channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Why the Ethereum Foundation is suddenly again at the center of crypto’s culture war
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're diving deep into the institution that has been the main steward for the Ethereum blockchain, and why its been back in the spotlight.

item.title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
item.description: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

item.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals
item.description: USAT's market cap jumped above $140 million in April, though it remains well behind Circle's USDC, PayPal's PYUSD and Ripple's RLUSD tokens.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 Is Here: Better AI Coding, Smarter Safety—Same Huge Price
item.description: Anthropic's latest flagship AI model Claude Opus 4.8 arrives with sharper reasoning, tighter alignment, and a price tag that hasn't budged.

item.title: Bitwise bets Hyperliquid could power future finance as HYPE ETFs gain traction
item.description: Bitwise says investor demand for Hyperliquid exposure is surging as new HYPE ETFs launch.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Model Nearing Release After Raising Cybersecurity Alarms
item.description: Anthropic signaled that broader access to its controversial Claude Mythos AI models may arrive "in the coming weeks" after limited testing.

item.title: Bitcoin Whales Are Pulling Back as Activity 'Mirrors' 2022 Bear Market: Analysts
item.description: Current Bitcoin whale activity is similar in nature to the last bear market in 2022 when BTC fell precipitously, according to on-chain data.

item.title: What the Clarity Act Means for the Rest of the World
item.description: The Senate’s crypto bill has supporters excited—and opponents concerned—about the bill’s potential reverberations beyond America’s borders.

item.title: Hyperliquid's pre-IPO SpaceX contracts suffers 45% flash crash, liquidating $1.5 million
item.description: A massive selloff in a SpaceX crypto token wiped out hundreds of retail traders in 30 minutes because the market lacked enough cash to absorb the shock.

item.title: Trezor adds native USDt, USDC yield via Morpho integration
item.description: The feature lets users earn stablecoin yield directly through Trezor Suite without connecting external wallets or using separate DeFi apps.

item.title: French company abandons crypto treasury strategy, will liquidate Bitcoin holdings
item.description: In the year since Sequans Communications announced that it would adopt a digital asset treasury strategy, the price of Bitcoin fell by more than 30%.

item.title: P2P.org launches real-time data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid
item.description: P2P.org, a blockchain infrastructure provider operating validators across 40+ proof-of-stake networks since 2018, today launched Syncro Data Stream, a real-time blockchain data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid.

item.title: UniCredit warns Europe may struggle to contain crypto-bank crisis under MiCA rules
item.description: EU deposit insurance (up to €100,000) may not absorb stress from large stablecoin reserve accounts, unlike the full protection offered by U.S. regulators.

item.title: Toddlers learn by falling: Why DeFi's $20 billion TVL drop is just a market stress-test
item.description: DeFi Technologies president Andrew Forson says the stablecoin layer is thriving, with more than $150 billion in U.S. Treasuries backing coins like USDT and USDC.

item.title: Google Engineer Charged Over $2.75 Million in Alleged Polymarket Insider Trading Bets
item.description: The Google employee case is the second federal prosecution tied to alleged prediction market insider trading on Polymarket.

item.title: Sui blockchain suffers another network outage as transactions grind to a halt
item.description: This is the second time this year that the Sui network has suffered an outage.

item.title: Standard Chartered Reaffirms $40K Ethereum Price Target Due to DeFi Dominance
item.description: Analysts compared Ethereum's current position to Amazon following the dot-com bubble burst.

item.title: Bitcoin Traders Increasingly Convinced Price Will Fall Below $70K by End of May
item.description: Prediction market odds are rising for Bitcoin to drop below $70,000 in the next few days following a dip to a six-week low price.

item.title: CAN ETHEREUM RECLAIM 2021 HIGHS VS BITCOIN? Standard Chartered’s Geoff Kendrick is bullish on Ethereum. He says the disconnect between ETH’s strong fundamentals and weak price is temporary. ETH has fallen 57% to ~$2,100 since August 2025, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1Cak40MHYzelBKVHFBYjlRVVdhb2dpSUN4XzA5ZUpJQkRvSjlsb2JkdjRhbzNzSnpwMlhuSmtwT19iTDJLaFVvdloyMWF5SHQ5OUlBelRjNHUtVXVDZVE?oc=5" target="_blank">CAN ETHEREUM RECLAIM 2021 HIGHS VS BITC…

item.title: Bitcoin pinned below $73,000 despite potential U.S.-Iran deal news
item.description: U.S. stocks and bonds, and the oil market are reacting positively to yet another purported peace agreement, but crypto markets remain under heavy pressure.

item.title: This AI Compressed 'All Human Cooking' Into 2 Megabytes
item.description: A London startup trained an AI on 4.1 million recipes across seven languages—and the whole thing is smaller than a song file.

item.title: Argentina bill targets crypto payments to illegal gambling sites
item.description: Argentina’s proposed online gambling bill would restrict banks, payment firms and crypto providers from serving unauthorized betting platforms.

item.title: A blockchain lottery plans to turn crypto gambling fees into Ethereum developer funding
item.description: Decentralized lottery protocol Megapot is teaming up with Protocol Guild in what the firms describe as the crypto industry’s first programmable charity lottery.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Asia’s regulated crypto future
item.description: Asia's adoption of crypto and stablecoins is driving regulated growth in payments and remittances. Learn how Singapore, Hong Kong, India, and Korea are leading the way.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Breaking: The Sui blockchain network has stopped producing blocks for nearly an hour. The official statement: The Sui Mainnet is currently experiencing a network stall. The Sui Core team is actively working on a solution. Transactions may be paused at this ti - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE55b1c5ZVFnR3FUTTlmdXFmeXVXZG1aUXRoZGtESk5LUzljTlV1SFdveVJQSDNLQ3JaSGpzYk52YUQzUmNBM004ZWVzbGFYdGxOMGNOdEFPVlI4Mk5VQzVlbTFFbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Breaking: The Sui blockchain net…

item.title: ERC-7943 author says institutions can’t play DeFi’s ‘pirate game’
item.description: RWA standard ERC-7943 reaches final stage as Ethereum builders rethink how institutional finance move onchain.

item.title: StanChart says Ethereum price will catch up to bullish internal metrics
item.description: Standard Chartered reaffirms bullish Ether price targets, citing strong network fundamentals even as ETH trades 57% below its 2025 peak and fund flows turn negative.

item.title: Prediction Market Myriad Launches $100K World Cup Competition
item.description: A prize pool of over $100,000 is available for top traders and makers on prediction markets linked to FIFA World Cup matches.

item.title: Disciplined AI agents are the disruptor needed to break the exchange churn model
item.description: Programmable incentives that allow independent trading agents to earn only when portfolios rise will create a fairer market for retail customers, explains Naja.

item.title: Gemini taps SpaceXAI to build a personalized prediction markets feed
item.description: The new feature integrates SpaceXAI models to deliver real-time market intelligence, personalized signals and portfolio insights directly inside the Gemini app.

item.title: Bitcoin bids farewell to CME futures gaps with $67K still on the radar
item.description: Bitcoin approached the final week of CME futures gaps with several still open, providing potential BTC price targets as low as $67,000.

item.title: The “Anti-Crypto Army” was defeated… by the courts… by the voters. And by Trump. It never made policy, legal or political sense. Combatting financial innovation only helped protect those that wanted to keep an old, often broken, system in place. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE91dTU0V0pSRGVIZU0wYVA3TmN2SWtvSXdzVWtkLXNJbmNZTFpPemxNcXB6SFJ5SWc2aTNZczU3M0U0S2laZjY3VjNlbV9mLWl1eUdScXllclVUalVlWDhoaU9mZG4?oc=5" target="_blank">The “Anti-Crypto Army” was defe…

item.title: XRP drops to 16-week lows: Can price fall below $1?
item.description: XRP breaks key support at $1.30 as bearish technical setups and weak investor sentiment point to a deeper correction toward $0.63.

item.title: 'Debasement trade’ falls out of favor as inflation fears cool, JPMorgan says
item.description: Investors are abandoning bitcoin and gold, perhaps sensing a coming end to Middle East hostilities.

item.title: Asset manager Grayscale delays IPO plans as crypto listing boom loses steam
item.description: Grayscale’s decision to delay its IPO highlights the growing caution across the crypto industry as volatile markets and weak investor demand weigh on public listing plans.

item.title: VanEck launches first U.S. spot BNB ETF on Nasdaq
item.description: The ETF offers investors BNB exposure through traditional brokerage accounts without requiring them to directly buy or store the token.

item.title: Aave Labs’ Push gains UK FCA crypto registration
item.description: Aave Labs’ Push received FCA approval for “certain cryptoasset activities” in the UK, supporting its plans for regulated stablecoin on- and off-ramping.

item.title: Bit Digital bought $20 million ETH for first time since October before 15% plunge
item.description: The firm said it purchased 8,568 ether on May 11 at an average price of $2,334. Since then, ETH broke below $2,000, leaving the firm sitting at a $3 million unrealized loss.

item.title: What's next as hot money cycle has gone from crypto to gold to AI to memory
item.description: As bitcoin and gold momentum fades, investor flows are increasingly rotating into AI infrastructure, semiconductor and memory-related equities.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) jumps 10.5% as nearly all assets fall
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) declined 12.2% while Bitcoin Cash (BCH) dropped 12.1%, leading the index lower.

item.title: Samsung units take $408M stake in Upbit operator Dunamu: Report
item.description: Samsung Securities, SDS and Card will buy 4% of Dunamu as Korean firms prepare for tokenized securities and stablecoin frameworks.

item.title: Ethereum under $2K: ETH whales sell as retail remains bullish
item.description: ETH's price has entered a decisive breakdown stage of its prevailing technical pattern, indicating further declines toward $1,750 despite strong retail sentiment.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Majors Slide on Iran Escalations, ETF Outflows
item.description: Massive ETF outflows just sent crypto sharply lower. Jefferies says the next crypto IPO wave could create a $1T public market.

item.title: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF sees near-record outflows as BTC dips below $75K
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs have turned negative year-to-date with $596 million in outflows as IBIT posted near-record withdrawals and Bitcoin fell below $75,000.

item.title: Mystery Bitcoin burn destroys 107 BTC worth about $8.5M
item.description: An unknown entity burned $8.5 million worth of Bitcoin after 12 years of holding, rendering the BTC unspendable, despite its price increasing by 12,700%.

item.title: VanEck's tokenized fund lands on Euler as DeFi courts Wall Street institutions
item.description: DeFi protocols are increasingly adapting to host regulated, tokenized assets as tokenization is projected to bring trillions of dollars onchain.

item.title: CME Goes 24/7 for Bitcoin Futures, Ending the “CME Gap” Era CME Group announced that it will officially enter the around-the-clock crypto market. Starting this Friday, CME Bitcoin futures and options will trade 24/7 on the Globex electronic trading platform, wi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5zNGwyRDFPWF90MHpHMmp0cElaaHJ2XzBGWlVuamNPSDhBYV9lSmNuWXd6d3BFbXVjWlRIUlFwVUZ4RUk4RTVkWU5YNzIzb0dvZ0ctSzB6d0ZGNEoyX3h2cVdLWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">CME Goes 24/7 for Bitcoin Future…

item.title: U.S.-Iran strikes rattle global markets, send bitcoin to 6-week low
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 28, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin Slips Under $73K as Crypto Liquidations Near $1B
item.description: The near-$1 billion crypto liquidation spree comes amid rising tensions over the U.S.-Iran conflict and ETF outflows.

item.title: Polymarket exec says KYC limited to beta product, not existing platform
item.description: Polymarket executive Josh Stevens said identity checks apply only to early beta access and are not being added to Polymarket’s existing platform.

item.title: BIS Project Agorá shows tokenized payments can settle in seconds
item.description: The Bank for International Settlements' collaboration with seven central banks and more than 40 institutions concludes a two-year project with a prototype settling wholesale payments in seconds.

item.title: CFTC, Gemini File Joint Motion to Reverse $5M Settlement
item.description: The regulator filed alongside the crypto exchange to undo a 2025 consent order it now says "should not have been filed."

item.title: Crypto liquidations hit $935M as Bitcoin price dips to $72.6K
item.description: Over $935 million was wiped out across the crypto market as traders shifted their focus to $70,000 as the last line of defense for Bitcoin.

item.title: BREAKING 🚨: Bitcoin $BTC Look Out Belowwwww 📉📉 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5IT0l1aXBUODFTSVBpU2RRVnVXaXNxV3BId1FZTVNWRUpxMnlHcUJWQjVNVWt1NUFfaUZmVE16UFYzcDV3RmJ3N3ptMTcwMm9FX0FIazRFNTlhSXlXV1E?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING 🚨: Bitcoin $BTC Look Out Belo…

item.title: #Bitcoin showing weakness isn't a recipe for a new low, as of yet. The standard approach is playing out here: in the final days of the month, markets correct as rebalancing takes place among asset managers. That's why this cooldown is happening on Bitcoin. T - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBKZGFaUjBEa1huRUw2RnA2TzdIVXphZnNRTWx2WFFpNUFqam9IN29EOUdIV2Z0WXdBbVkwR2R6SC1GYUpHOVN6YkU1LVYxZ3pEU0hJY2ROV3FZRVgyWWhfZWZlVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin showing weakness isn't …

item.title: Crypto companies have tightened compliance, but gaps remain: Chainalysis
item.description: Around 47% of crypto organizations onboarded in 2026 are operating at alerting standards that would have ranked among the industry’s strictest five years ago.

item.title: BNB joins US spot ETF market through VanEck’s VBNB launch
item.description: The physically backed fund gives US investors exchange-traded exposure to the Binance-linked cryptocurrency through traditional brokerage accounts.

item.title: Crypto markets shed $80B after fresh US strikes on Iran
item.description: The crypto market capitalization has fallen to its lowest level since mid-April after the US carried out strikes on Iran for the second time in three days amid peace talks.

item.title: BREAKING: President Trump releases a statement on crypto. “Trump will never let crypto down,” he says. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE44V2p4YXBua1J0VjZyeGdkSjdHTDZxbGlCVkppVlZndTMwaldhZTN4Nm1VZ1ZRbWVIc1NhYjhZZUtsRWJQS0lfQVNqZnVjRUx2R3ZoNHhhUzloWGZOYWlURnlFckljdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: President Trump re…
